visual_description: The child, wearing a red and gray striped sweater over a plaid shirt, stands in a dimly lit bedroom facing a closed wooden door. He holds a red marker in his right hand and writes the letters "PE" on the door, then draws a heart shape beside them. In the background, a lamp casts a warm glow over a bed where a person lies under a blanket.
audio_description: The faint scratching of the marker on the door is audible, while the rest of the room is quiet.
